annotations.annotation: Adopted by the Legislature of the Menominee Indian Tribe 8-7-1995 by Ord. No. 95-12. Amendments noted where applicable

section.heading: Title.
section.text: This chapter shall be titled "Noise Abatement."

section.heading: Purpose.
section.text: The purpose of this chapter is to prohibit excessive or unusual noise generated by persons on the Menominee Indian Reservation.

footnote.text: Editor's Note: Former § 429-3, General prohibition, and former § 429-4, Public address systems, car stereos, stereos and amplifiers, were repealed 9-3-2015 by Ord. No. 14-30.

section.heading: Construction and machinery noise.
section.text: Except for permitted contractors, independent contractors, and employees of the Tribe and Menominee Tribal Enterprises acting in their official capacity, no person shall do construction work or operate any chain saw, lawn mower or any other loud machinery between the hours of 10:00 p.m. and 6:00 a.m.

section.heading: Violations and penalties.
section.text: Any violation of this chapter shall result in a forfeiture of $50 for a first offense and a forfeiture not less than $50 nor more than $100 for a second and subsequent offense.
